root.name: SpotMeter
root.description: Dynamic minimap circle showing the distance from which your tank can currently be spotted, plus a draggable in-battle panel: enemy list with view ranges, manual or automatic target picking with per-class presets, English/Polish UI. Numpad hotkeys; PageDown shows/hides the panel. Configure it in the garage via a mods-settings menu (optional) or spotmeter.json.
